Translation.Description: Legendary gladiator Black Spike was said to be invincible in the arena, piling up victories and corpses, slaying champions and monsters alike with tireless and relentless determination. This helmet radiates glory galore, and maybe you could claim some as your own?
Translation.Provides: 1.5% less damage from Physical attacks per Level
Collect three Black Spike items to inflict Dismantling Stroke- +400% Crushing Blow Attack
